# SmartDate Notice

This project includes an adapted local date picker inspired by SmartDate.

- Source: https://github.com/JamesnetGroup/smartdate
- License: MIT
- Copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 vickyqu115

The adapted XFVerse control keeps the SmartDate-style WPF `Control` plus `Popup` and calendar grid approach, while replacing visual resources, naming, and interaction details to match XFVerse.
